message:
test(fj-conformance): add 25 oracle tests for Rsqrt primitive

Comprehensive conformance tests for Primitive::Rsqrt (reciprocal sqrt):
- Perfect squares: rsqrt(1)=1, rsqrt(4)=0.5, rsqrt(9)=1/3, etc.
- Non-perfect squares: rsqrt(2), rsqrt(3), rsqrt(5)
- Fractional values: rsqrt(0.25)=2, rsqrt(0.5)=sqrt(2)
- Zero: rsqrt(0) = +infinity
- Negative values: rsqrt(-x) = NaN
- Infinity: rsqrt(+inf)=0, rsqrt(-inf)=NaN
- NaN propagation
- Very small/large values (1e-100, 1e100)
- 1D, 2D, 3D tensor shapes
- Mathematical identities: rsqrt(x)*sqrt(x)=1, rsqrt(x)^2=1/x

Previously only 2 tests existed in lax_oracle.rs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
